title: SERCHHIP-AH SIR-2026 KALPUI MEK DAN THLIRLETNA NEIH A NI; MIZORAM-AH SERCHHIP DISTRICT CHU ENUMERATION FORM SEM ZO HMASA BER AN NI
content:
875/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 5th June 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Election Officer Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin Serchhip District-a Special Intensive Revision (SIR)-2026 kalpui mek dan thlirletna leh sawi hona neih a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Serchhip District chu Mizoram-ah SIR-2026 Enumeration Form 100% sem zo hmasa ber an nih thu tarlan a ni a. He hna hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan hian bial hrang hrangah ngawrh taka hmalak niin Training leh Awareness campaign hrang hrangte lo neih tawh a ni bawk.

Meeting-ah hian SIR-2026 chu, a hlawhtling thei ang ber leh chak zawka kalpui zel a nih theih dan tur hrang hrangte sawi ho niin, Voter Awareness Forum (VAF) te, Electoral Literacy Club (ELC) te hmangin hma lak zui zel tum a nih thu sawi lan a ni a; naktuk June ni 6 hian Mobile Van hmangin form thehluh kawnga harsatna awm theihna hmunte tlawh chhuah a ni bawk dawn a ni.

District Election Officer chuan he hna pawimawh tak mai tluang taka thawh a nih theih nana thawktute leh mawhphurhna changtu zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu sawiin, thahnemngai taka thawk chhunzawm zel turin a sawm bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Serchhip atangin Election Officer Pi Lalchhanhimi; ERO Pi Rebecca Laldinmawii Hrahsel; AERO Pu Vanthangpuia leh AERO Pu Chawngthu Lalrinhlua te an tel a. Biakhmuhtheihna hmangin Thenzawl SDO (C)/ERO Pu Lalhlimpuia leh N. Vanlaiphai atangin SDO (C)/ERO Pi Marilyn Lalruatkimi te an tel bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB-AH DISTRICT LEVEL GREEN MIZORAM DAY COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
874/2026-2027

Kolasib, 5th June, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu  khan Kolasib DC Office Conference Hall-ah District Level Green Mizoram Day Committee te chu an thukhawm a. He thutkhawm hi District Level Green Mizoram Day Committee Chairman leh Kolasib Deputy Commissioner ni bawk, Pu H. Dolianbuaia'n a kaihruai a.

State sawrkar ruahmanna siam angin kumin Green Mizoram Day hi lo awm tur June ni 11-ah hman turin an rel a ni.

Thutkhawm kaihruaitu Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, Green Mizoram Day kan hman thinnaah thingtiak tam tak phun tawh thin mah se, a hnu lama enkawl zui a nih loh thin avangin a nung chhuak an tlem thin hle a ni, a ti. Chuvangin, kuminah chuan department tin ten an thing phun thlante uluk takin enkawl zui se, a tinung thate hnenah lawmman siam pawh a thain a hlu hle ang a ti a. Thing phun uar a tul rualin, a mawi leh tangkai tur lam thlan thiam a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Pu Aniket P. Goanker, IFS, DFO Kolasib hnen atangin nikum lama Green Mizoram Day hman dan report ngaihthlak a ni a. Nikum khan Green Mizoram Day hi Thingdawl Community Hall-ah Deputy Speaker Pu Lalfamkima khuallian nena hman a nih thu leh, hemi hnu hian JNV Thingdawl-ah thingtiak phun a nih thu a tarlang a. JNV Thingdawl-a thingtiak phun zinga 87% vel chu a nung tha a ni tih a tarlang.Vawiin thutkhawm hian kumin Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman dan tur hetiang hian a rel a ni a .A hawnna program hi Parish Hall, Kolasib-ah June ni 11, 2026 chawhma dar 10:30-ah neih a ni ang a,Khuallian atan Kolasib Bialtu MLA leh Deputy Speaker ni bawk, Pu Lalfamkima chu beisei a ni.

He hunah hian kumin Fire Prevention Week hman chhunga kangmei ven kawnga hma la tha khuate hnenah lawmman hlan a ni ang a, thing phun hnatlang bikah, tlemte phuna hawnna (Ceremonial Planting) hi Kolasib Sports Stadium-ah neih a ni ang a, a huhoa tam tak phunna (Mass Plantation) erawh KVK Kolasib-ah neih a ni thung ang.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM STATE PROJECT MONITORING COMMITTEE (MSPMC) CHUAN MIZORAM HMUN HRANG HRANGA PROJECT KAL LAI MEK PASARIH (7) ENDIK TAWHTE ‘REVIEW MEETING’ NEI
content:
873/2026-2027

Dated 6thJune, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee (MSPMC) chuan Pu R. Lal Rinawma, IRS (Rtd.), Vice Chairman, MSPMC hovin project thawh mek lai pasarih (7) an endik tawhte uluk taka thlir hona an nei a. Chungte chu:-

He hna kal lai mek thlir honaah hian MSPMC member te bakah nodal department te, executing department te leh a thawktu theuh contractor te an tel a. Heng hnathawh kal lai mekte hi a hmunah uluk taka an endik hnuah he ‘hna thlir letna’ hi neih a ni a. He ‘hna thlir hona’ ah hian hnathawh kal lai meka harsatna awm theite sawi hovin, hna quality tha tak neih dan turte sawi a ni a. Tin, a hun taka hna an zawh theih lohna chhan leh harsatna hrang hrang awm theite sutkian dan turte sawi ho a nih bakah a rang thei ang bera heng hnate hi zawh ngei a nih theih dan tur uluk taka sawiho a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH WORLD ENVIRONMENT DAY PUALIN HUN HMAN A NI
content:
872/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 5th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Environment Forest & Climate Change (EF&CC) Department bultumin Khawzawl Government High School-ah World Environment Day pualin hun hman a ni a. He hun hi Headmaster Pu Lallawmthanga’n a kaihruai a, Khawzawl Wildlife Division DFO Pu Lalnunthanga leh Khawzawl District Honorary Wildlife Warden Pu PC Rosiama te chuan an hmanpui.

DFO Pu Lalnunthanga chuan World Environment Day 2026 theme 'Inspired By Nature, For Climate, For Our Future’ tih thupui-ah hmangin, zirlai kalkhawmte hnenah ramngaw leh nungchate humhalh a pawimawh zia a hrilh a. Kumin World Environment Day puala khawvel pum huapa hun hmanna pui ber chu Azerbaijan-a neih a nih thute a sawi bawk a. Mihring leh nungchate chu in mamawh tawn reng kan nih thu sawiin, ramngaw leh nungchate kan humhalh lova, thing leh mau kan kit nasat lutuk avanga khua a lum telh telh (global warming) thu te, chu chuan taksa leh rilru hriselna pawh a tihchhiat thu leh natna inkaichhawn theih chi hrang hrang a hluar phah thu te a sawi a. Zirlaite chu ramngaw leh nungcha humhalh a pawimawh zia zira hrechiangtu an nih angin auchhuahpui ngam turin a fuih a. Hemi kawngah hian an finna leh thiamna hmang tangkai zel turin a chah bawk a ni.

Honorary Wildlife Warden Pu PC Rosiama pawhin nungchate leh ramngaw nasa lehzuala humhalh a ṭul thu leh hemi kawnga theih tawp chhuah tura fuihna thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin hunah hian kalkhawmten Environment Day pualin thutiam an sawi rual a. Mi pahnihin an silaite tungin (Surrendering of weapons)  Deptt Hotute hriatpuinain hming an ziak bawk a ni,.

Attachment

title: TOURISM MINISTER PU LALNGHINGLOVA HMAR IN 'TAXI PU TITI' LEHKHABU TLANGZARH
content:
871/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 5th of June, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Tourism Department chuan MINECO, Aizawla a office chamber-ah Pu H. Laldanmawia lehkhabu ziak ‘Taxi Pu Titi’ tih chu a tlangzarh.

Lehkhabu tlangzarhtu Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan kum 2025 a Tourism Department in 'Best Taxi Driver' chawimawina an hlan Pu Laldanmawia lehkhabu tlangzarhnaah hian, "Taxi driver-te hi Tourism Department thlirnaag chuan kan tour guide te an ni a, kan information centre hmasa ber an ni bawk. Taxi driver kan neih that chuan tourism-ah kan thang dawn a, kan neih that loh chuan rel a lo lutte hi an lo kal nawn tawh lo mai thei. An lo kal nawn fo erawh chuan tourist hmun tha tak kan ni mai dawn a, chuvang chuan kan inkungkaihna hi a hnai em em a ni. Khualzin lo kal zawng zawng deuhthaw ten kan rama an rawn hman hmasak ber an nih avangin keini tan chuan an pawimawh hle a ni." a ti.

Tourism minister chuan sawi belh zelin, "Taxi driver te hi Mizoram phurtute an ni a, mi chi hrang hrang an phur a, mikhualten a Mizoram chanchin chiang zawka an rawn hmelhriatna hmasa ber chu anni hi a, chuvang chuan Mizoram hi an phur a, an pawimawh tak zet a ni." a ti a. "Taxi driver tam tak hi chu Mizoram tana pawimawh leh hnam tana mi hlu an ni. Chutiang chiah chuan thenkhatte chu an tangkai tluk zetin hnam tana pawi khawih thei an ni bawk." tiin a sawi bawk.

He lehkhabu ziaktu Pu H. Laldanmawia hi kum 2025 khan World Tourism Day-ah taxi driver tha lawmman dawng tura thlan a ni a. Amah hi veng chhung chanchinbu leh hmun hrang hrangah thu lo ziak tawh thin a ni bawk.

Lehkhabu thlirlawktu Dr. H. Laldinmawia chuan, he lehkhabu-ah hian thuziak tha tak tak 64 lai a awm thu sawiin, 'Taxi Pu Titi' tia a bu hmingah phuah a nih avang hian, a nuihzatthlak zawng te, a ngaihnawm lai deuhte awm tura ngaih a awl viau laiin, mihring nun infuih tharna lam lehkhabu 'Motivational literature' lehkhabu tha tak a nih thu a sawi. He lehkhabu hi phek 202 -a chhah, Rs. 250 man tur a ni.

He lehkhabu tlangzarhna inkhawm hi Dr. Daniel Lalawmpuia'n a kaihruai a, Rev. JH Zahluna'n hunserh a hmang bawk.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT - A DARNAMTLANG KHUAA KAWTHALO AWM CHUNGCHANGAH BAWRHSAP HOVA THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
870/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 5th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 3:30 PM khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin a Office Chamber - ah Health Department hotute leh MJA Lawngtlai District hruaituten kawthalo leng chungchangah thutkhawm an nei.

Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Darnamtlanga kawthalo hrileng nia sawi chu Sorkarin a vil reng thu leh mipui tan chiaina tur a awmloh thu a tarlang a. Tun dinhmuna vil mektu Medical Team - te thurawn ngaipawimawh tur leh he natna vei leh inringhlelte chuan Sub- Centre leh PHC pan zung zung turin a chah nghal bawk.

Dr. Lalmuanawma Jongte, Sr. CMO, Lawngtlai chuan damlo te natdan atangin hrileng chu Tuihri a nih a rinawmloh tih sawiin, sample lain enfiah turin hmalakna erawh kalpui tho a ni a ti a.Hrileng a awm tih hriat a nih hnuah Medical Team tirin nguntakin Darnamtlang hi vilin, an mamawhtur damdawi te pawh thawnluh a ni a ti a, tun dinhmunah Darnamtlang khawchhungah Damlo pali awmin an dinhmun a ngaihtuahawmloh va, Bungtlang South PHC - ah mi pahnih inentirte pawh Admit ngai an nilova, he natna vang hian Bungtlang South PHC ah mipakhat enkawlmek niin a dinhmun a tha tih CMO chuan a tarlang a.Sr. CMO chuan hriattheih chinah Kawthalo vei mi pasarih an awm a ti a, hrileng anga ngaihtheih a nih rihloh thu leh damlote pawh enkawlna thatak nen ngaihtuahawm an awmlo ani, a ti.

Kawthalo leh luak vangin June 2, 2026 khan kum 53 mi Pu Zeria chu a thi a, heimi hnu hian mipui an mangan zual deuh niin a hriat a, Darnamtlang hi In 115, mihring 540 vel chenna niin, Bungtlang South PHC hnuaia awm niin, Medical Officer kaihhruaina hnuaiah Medical Team ten nguntakin an vil mek a ni.

Thutkhawm ah hian Addl.DC, SDC leh Dy.CMO te an tel bawk a, Bawrhsap chuan lawm thusawiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

title: Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata’n MASA Conference a hmanpui
content:
869/2026-2027

5th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata chuan, Mizoram Agriculture Service Association (MASA) General Conference, Berawtlang Tourist Complex-ah a hmanpui.

Conference-ah hian thu sawiin, Minister chuan MAS officer indaih lohna a nasa hle a, post ruak te hnawhkhah a nih theihnan, a tul anga recruitment kalpui zel a tul thu a sawi a; MAS officer kalkhawm te an hnathawhna kawngah theihtawp chhuah turin leh, an hna chu farmer te tana hlawkna tur a ni tih hria a, sorkar scheme te bel taka zirchianga thawk turin a fuih.

Thawhhona kawngah pawh MAS officer te chu an fakawm a tih thu sawiin, posting chungchangah pawh harsatna siam lo va sorkarin a dahna pianga awm zel thei turin thu a chah nghal bawk.

Kan hnathawh te rawngbawlna angah ngai a, hah bik deuh te kan awm a nih pawhin, vui lovin Pathianin mipui leh farmer te tana rawngbawl tura min dahna a ni tih hriain, hna kan thawk tur a ni a ti.

Minister chuan Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Department-ah mipuiin beiseina sang tak an nei a, an beiseina te timit tu ni lovin, tihlawhtling tu ni thei turin a tul ang zelin mahni insiamrem a, sorkar leh mipui tan theihtawp chhuah zel turin MAS officer te a fuih. Inlungrual taka mi tinin theihtawp kan chhuah theuh chuan, kalphung thar, hma lam pan zel theihna tur danglamna kan thlen thei a ni a ti.

Conference-ah hian Mizoram hmun hrang hranga MAS officer te an kalkhawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah kawṭhalo vanga naupang thihna a thlen loh nana ni 45 chhung STOP Diarrhoea Campaign (SDC) 2026 beihpui thlak tur chungchang sawi ho a ni
content:
868/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 5:Vawiin khan Lunglei District SDC Steering Committee chu Sub-Divisional Officer (Sadar) Pi TT Beikhaizi kaihhruaiin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm a. Lunglei District chhunga kawṭhalo (diarrhoea) vanga naupang thihna a thlen lohna tura ni 45 (June 16 - July 31, 2026) chhung beihpui thlak, STOP Diarrhoea Campaign (SDC) 2026 kalpui dan tur an sawi ho.

He hunah hian Lunglei District Senior Chief Medical Officer Dr Lalrinthangi chuan Stop Diarrhoea Campaign kalpui a ṭul chhan leh he campaign kalpui tura ruahmanna awm sate a tar lang a. SDC chu kawṭhalo vanga naupang kum 5 hnuai lam thihna thleng ṭhin venna tura ruahman a nih thu tar langin, nikuma STOP Diarrhoea Campaign kalpui dan report a tar lang bawk.

Lunglei District tana STOP Diarrhoea campaign kalpui tur hi June ni 16, 2026 (Thawhlehni)-ah primary school remchangah a bul ṭanna hun hman ni se tih niin, hun hman dan tur kimchang chu SCMO Office-in lo ruahman se, tih a ni a. SDC hlawhtlin nana department hrang hrang – Health & Family Welfare, School Education, Women & Child Development, Public Health Engineering leh tlawmngai pawlte mawhphurhna lwh pawimawhna te sawi ho niin, mahni zawnah ṭheuh theih tawp chhuah leh tura inngen a ni.

SCMO report aṭanga a lan danin, nikum 2025-a SDC kalpui chhung khan Lunglei health district (Lunglei District leh Hnahthial District inkawp) chhungah kawṭhalo ven/enkawl nan ORS leh Zinc tablet pek tur naupang kum 5 hnuai lam 13,684 tinzawn niin, mi 13,118 (95.9%) hnenah pek a ni a. Kumina SDC kalpui chhung hian Lunglei District bikah naupang kum 5 hnuai lam 10,952 tinzawn niin, ORS bawm (packet) 2 zel leh Zinc tablet mum 14 zel pek tura ruahman a ni a. Kum dang ang bawkin, kawṭhalo ven beihpui thlak chhung hian anganwadi centre, sikul leh damdawi in hrang hrangahte ORS & Zinc Corner siama damdawi (ORS & Zinc) sem hi kalpui a nih dawn bakah, kawṭhalo ven dan leh enkawl dan te, tui thianghlim in leh hman pawimawhna te, kut sil fai pawimawhna leh kut sil fai dan te, faina leh thianghlimna chungchanga naupangte leh anmahni enkawltute tana hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang inzirtirna te buatsaih leh a ni bawk ang.

Health department report aṭanga a lan danin, nikum 2025 STOP Diarrhoea Campaign kalpui chhung khan Lunglei District chhungah naupang kum 5 hnuai lam kawṭhalo vei 99 (mipa 44 leh hmeichhia 55) hriat chhuah an ni a. Kawṭhalo vanga thi erawh an awm hriat a ni lo. Nikum chhungin Lunglei District chhung khaw 145-ah Village Health, Sanitation & Nutrition Day-ah faina chungchang inzirtir a ni a. Primary school 234-ah leh anganwadi centre 402-ah kut sil dan inzirtir a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: MLA PI BARYL VANNEIHSANGI HOVIN YOUNG INDIANS PARLIAMENT 2026 NI HNIHNA HMANG
content:
867/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 5th June, 2026:Vawiin khan MLA Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi chuan Young Indians (YI) Mizoram Chapter-in Mizoram Assembly Annexe Conference Hall-a a buatsaih Young Indians Parliament ni hnihna leh a tawpna chu khualzahawm niin a hmanpui.

Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi chuan zirna tha leh thiamna hmantlak neih a tul zia sawiin, politics ah pawh zirna a pawimawhzia a sawi a; lehkhathiamlo a ram hruai tum chu mipui te tan a himloh thu a sawi. Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi chuan politics bulpui ber chu mipui rawngbawl hna anih thu sawiin, mipui rawngbawl hna hi kawng awlsam a ni lova, huaisenna, rinawmna leh inpekna a pawimawh hle a ni ti. Politician tha awmzia chu room chhunga au ring ber ni lovin mipuite harsatna ngaihthlaksak a, an harsatna sut kian sak tura theihtawp chhuah thin te hi an ni, a ti.

Pi Baryl-i chuan ram rawngbawl tur hian naupang luat a awm lova thil thlak danglam tur chuan kum naupang zawkte hi an tha a, politics hi tawp chin nei lo intlansiakna a ni a, hriatthiamloh leh chak loh chang awm mahse rawngbawlna chhunzawm zel a ram hruaitu tha tak ni theuh turin intihsiaknaa tel te chu a fuih a ni.

Intihsiak ni hnihna hi matters of urgent public importance sawihona-in tan a ni a, constituency hrang hrang atanga sawihona neih a nih hnuah intihsiakna chhunzawm a ni.

Pu Alan Lalhriatpuia, Chair YI Mizoram Chapter chuan kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. He intihsiaknaah hian Pi Hannah Lallawmpuii chu Chief Judge niin Dr. Jerry Lalmuansanga leh Dr F. Lalramhluni te chu judge an ni a, Pu Vanlalzawma, Ex MLA leh Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi te chu Special Jugde an ni. Intihsiaknaa tel te hi criteria hrang hrang hmanga endik an ni. Pu Francis L Khiangte, Co-Chair YI Mizoram Chapter chuan lawmthu sawina in hun a khar a ni.Lawmman hrang hrang la tute:

Best Parliamentarian Award:Sydrogi Maximus Chang - St Paul’s Higher Secondary School

Best Speaker Award:R. Lalhruaitluanga, Mt Carmel School

Leadership Excellence Award:Sydrogi Maximus Chang, St Paul’s Higher Secondary School

Best Member (Ruling Bench):Lalruathlua Bochung, St Paul’s Higher Secondary School

Best Member (Opposition Bench):Annabel Lalenkawli, St Paul’s Higher Secondary School

Best Debator Award:Timothy J Mawkha, Mt Carmel School

Best Persuasive Policy Advocate:Joshua Lalnunpuia, Mt Carmel School

Best Research And Presentation Award:Lalrinzuali, Synod Higher Secondary School

Innovative Ideas Award:Marcus Lalrindika Hnamte, Mt Carmel School

Community Impact Award:Grace Lalpeki Chawngthu, St Stephen’s School

Most Valuable Participant Award:Mercy Chingninghoih, St Paul’s Higher Secondary School

Team Spirit Award:Vansangzuala Vanchhawng, St Paul’s Higher Secondary School

Exemplary Parliamentary Decorum:Ruth Lalmuanpuii, Mt Carmel School

Exemplary Parliamentary Decorum:Lallawmzuala Hnamte, Mt Carmel School

Independent Voice Of The House Award:Ruth L Darzikpuii, Mt Carmel School

Best Constituency Representative:Gideon K Lalmuanawma, Mt Carmel School

title: Lungleiah Oil Palm Zonal Committee an ṭhu khawm
content:
866/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 5:Nimin khan Oil Palm Zonal Committee, Lunglei District chu District Agriculture Office-ah an ṭhu khawm a. Lunglei District-a oil palm chin kawnga hma lakna leh hmachhawp hrang hrang an sawi ho.

Ṭhut khawm hi Chairman Pu V. Kapchungnunga (Oil Palm Grower) chuan a kaihruai a. Member Secretary, District Agriculture Officer Dr Samuel Lalliansanga'n report pein, thu ngaihtuah turte a sawi zau bawk.

He ṭhut khawmah hian nikum 2025–2026 chhung khan oil palm rah FFB (Fresh Fruit Bunch) hi Partner Company Patanjali Foods Company Ltd chuan metric tonne 503 leiin, a chingtute kutah cheng nuai 71 (₹71,00,774/-) a lut tih tar lan a ni a. Kumin 2026-a Lunglei District-a oil palm chinna hmun zauh (area expansion) tur hmachhawp hectare 300-a chin turin oil palm ṭiak (seedling) pawh sem zawh ṭep a nih tawh thu tar lan a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah LMC huaihawt Fai Inelna hawnna leh Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 zir hona hun buatsaih a ni
content:
865/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 5:Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) huaihawta Lunglei khawpui chhunga Fai Inelna kalpui tur hawnna leh bawlhhlawh thliar hran leh sawngbawl dan, Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 chungchang zir hona hun chu vawiin khan World Environment Day pualin Convention Centre Hall, Lungleiah buatsaih a ni.

LMC Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga'n Lunglei Municipal Council huam chhunga veng fai inelna kalpui tur chu a hawng a. LMC huam chhunga veng hrang hrangte chu huang (category) hnihah ṭhenin, veng lian zualte category I-ah an awm ang a; a bak chu Category-II ah awmin, inelna hi ṭhuang hniha kalpui tur a ni.

LMC Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga chuan Lunglei mipuite chu thil ṭha tih kawnga inlungrual leh ṭang rual thei tur an nih thu sawiin, faina kawngah ṭan la deuh deuh turin mipuite a ngen a. Fai Inelna chu inelna thianghlim leh hmasawnna atan hman tum tur te, mahni khawpui hmangaihna rilru nena theih tawp chhuah zel tur te'n Lunglei mipuite a sawm.

LMC Vice Chairman & Municipal Sanitation Committee Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma'n hun kaihruaiin, Lunglei mipuite chu faina kawngah thawhpui an nawm thu leh faina kawngah LMC chuan theih tawp a chhuah zel tur thu a sawi.

LMC Secretary Pu Lalremruata Sailo chuan bawlhhlawh thliar hran leh sawngbawl dan bakah, veng fai inelna endikna tehfung ruahmante a sawi fiah a. Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 chu April 1, 2026 aṭanga hman ṭan a nih thu sawiin, he dan hnuaia State Sawrkar, Municipality, Local Council leh mimal mawhpurhna hrang hrangte a sawi fiah.

He hunah hian Local Council member-te nen zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk a. LMC Chief Executive Officer Pu Lalhmansanga chuan lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL CLUSTER-A PUANTAHTUTE HNENAH WORKSHED SAKNA TUR  SEM A NI
content:
864/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 5th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan DRDO Conference Hall, Khawzawlah Directorate of Commerce & Industries, Govt. of Mizoram huaihawtin Khawzawl Cluster-a puantahtute hnena workshed sakna tur leh puantahna khawl semna hun hman a ni a. Dr. H. Lianzela, Secretary, CIG&M Dept chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Pu K. Lalhmuakliana, DCIO, Khawzawl chuan he inkhawm hi a kaihruai.

Khuallian Dr. H. Lianzela chuan thusawiin vawiinah Khawzawl District puantahtute hmasawnna tur atana pawimawh tak pakhat puantahna khawl leh insakna tur sum leh pai semna hun hman a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thute, puantah hi eizawnna tling, chhungkua mai bakah ram leh hnam thlenga min phochhuaktu tha tak a nih ziate sawiin, tualchhung mamawh, kan district chhung mamawh tal phuhruk thei tura tan la turin tanpuina dawngtute chu a sawm a. Sawrkar tel leh tello pawha kal thei turin Khawzawl district hian handloom lamah theihna a neih thute sawiin, khawl leh a insakna tur sum leh pai an pekte hluihlawn emaw thildanga hmanglo tur leh hmang tangkai ngei ngei turin a chah a. Anmahni tan mai bakah khawtlang, district leh ram tan malsawmna tur a ni a ti a. Export quality tha leh felfai nei thei tura ngaihtuahna hmang zau turin a chah bawk a. Khawzawl district thar hmasawn zelna turah hian office-a thu te chauh hi an pawimawh lo a, in tina khawsate hi kan pawimawh vek a ni a ti a. Chuvangin duhsak tlak leh enzui tlak turin vawiina tanpuina dawngtute chu ke pena hmala turin a sawm a ni.

He inkhawmah Pu PC Lianchungnunga, PO(HTH) C&I Deptt. chuan technical report a pe a, Bialtu MLA aiawhin a fanu Pi Lalnun Thari’n thusawina hun a nei a,  Pi Hunthianghlimi , DD (HTH) C&I Deptt in lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: Lunglei Inaugurates First-Ever 3R Centre to Promote Sustainable Waste Management
content:
147/2026-2027

Lunglei, 5 June 2026:Marking World Environment Day 2026, Lunglei today took a significant step towards sustainable waste management and environmental conservation with the inauguration of the 3R (Reduce, Reuse, Recycle) Centre at Chanmari. Established under the Mizoram District Transformation Programme (MDTP) of the Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme, the Centre is the first of its kind in the district and seeks to promote waste reduction, reuse and recycling for a cleaner, greener and more sustainable future.

The 3R Centre was inaugurated by Deputy Commissioner, Lunglei, Pi Navneet Mann, who attended the programme as the Chief Guest. Following the inauguration, the Deputy Commissioner inspected the Centre and reviewed its facilities and operational arrangements.

Addressing the gathering, the Chief Guest expressed her delight at the opening of the first-ever 3R Centre in Lunglei and southern Mizoram, noting that the initiative closely reflects the Mizo ethos of sharing and community support, embodied in the saying, "Sem sem dam dam, ei bil thi thi." She encouraged citizens to donate usable household items, clothing and other materials that are no longer needed but remain in good condition so that they may benefit those who need them. Emphasising that the success of the Centre would depend on active community participation, she called upon the residents of the district, in addition to MHIP, to extend their wholehearted support to the initiative. She also conveyed her gratitude to the Government of Mizoram and the Hon'ble Chief Minister for providing support under the MDTP component of the Bana Kaih Scheme, which made the establishment of the Centre possible. She expressed confidence that the Centre would emerge as a useful, successful and sustainable community resource for the people of southern Mizoram.

The programme was attended by officials, leaders of MHIP and YMA, members of the MJA, and Electoral Literacy Club members of Lunglei Government College. It was chaired by District Urban Development Officer, Pi Lalhruaitluangi, who delivered a brief presentation on the objectives of the 3R Centre and the initiatives being undertaken under MDTP. Participants also took a pledge affirming their commitment to waste segregation, sustainable waste management and active participation in the Special Intensive Revision (SIR).

A significant highlight of the event was the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between the District Urban Development Office (DUDO), Lunglei and the Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP), Sub-Headquarters Lunglei. MHIP Sub-Headquarters Lunglei President Pi Lalliannguri also addressed the gathering. Under the collaboration, MHIP will facilitate the collection of reusable household items from community members for the Centre, from where they will be made available to those in need. The initiative is expected to reduce waste generation while ensuring that usable items continue to benefit other members of society.

As part of the programme, a Signature Campaign on Waste Segregation and Sustainable Waste Management was launched to promote responsible waste management practices among citizens, with the Chief Guest and participants signing their names in support of the initiative. A Voter Awareness Forum and Help Desk for the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 was also organised to raise awareness about the importance of maintaining an accurate electoral roll and to encourage eligible voters to submit their Enumeration Forms during the prescribed period from 30 May to 28 June 2026. The Deputy Commissioner called upon all citizens to actively participate in the exercise.

The programme also showcased the role of Self Help Groups (SHGs) under the DAY-NULM scheme through the display of value-added products created by recycling and upcycling collected materials. The initiative is expected to generate livelihood opportunities while promoting circular economy practices.

The 3R Centre has been established through the joint efforts of MDTP, Swachh Bharat Mission–Urban 2.0 (SBM-U 2.0) and DAY-NULM. Located at Chanmari, opposite BCM Church, the Centre will remain open during office hours and will function as a collection, redistribution and recycling hub for reusable materials.

Under the mobilisation of MHIP Sub-Headquarters, Lunglei, seven MHIP branches in Lunglei town have already collected and donated reusable household items, including utensils, clothing, books and stationery, to the 3R Centre. Seven additional branches are scheduled to undertake similar collection drives by the end of this month, while the remaining eight branches will do so next month. Thereafter, the Centre will continue to be sustained through voluntary donations from individual citizens. Members of the public were encouraged to donate usable items for the benefit of others and to support the objectives of the 3R Centre.

Items collected at the Centre will be made available free of cost to those in need during office hours. The initiative seeks not only to reduce waste generation but also to promote a culture of sharing, reuse and mutual support within the community.

Attachment

title: Lungleia hman nawn theih bungraw dah khawmna leh lak chhuahna hmunpui 3R Centre hmasa ber hawn a ni
content:
863/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 5:Vawiin World Environment Day 2026 lawmna peng khat atan, Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hnuaia Mizoram District Transformation Programme (MDTP), Lunglei District hma laknaa din, Lungleia hman nawn theih bungraw dah khawmna leh lak chhuahna hmunpui, 3R (Reduce, Reuse, Recycle) Centre hmasa ber, Chanmari-a mi chu Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan ṭangkai taka hman turin vawiin khan a hawng a. He Project hi Lunglei District Urban Development Office (DUDO) te'n buaipuiin, bawlhhlawh tihtlem, hman nawn leh ṭangkai zawka hman a nih theih nana bungraw hlui la hman tlak site dah khawmna leh a thlawna lak chhuahna hmun atana ruahman a ni.

He huna Khuallian, Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan 3R Centre hi hawngin, a chhung fang kualin a en nghal a. Lunglei leh Mizoram chhim lama 3R Centre hmasa ber tur hawn a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, 3R Centre chu Mizo hnam ziarang, "Sem sem dam dam, ei bil thi thi" tih leh mi dang ṭanpui duhna rilru nen inrem hlea a hriat thu a sawi a. In chhung khura kan bungrua leh thawmhnaw hlui, kan hman ṭangkai loh leh hmun awh khat site a hmang ṭangkai tur leh mamawh zawkte'n an lo chhawr theih nana 3R Centre-a dah chu intihhmuh zel ṭha a tih thu sawiin, 3R Centre hlawhtlin nan MHIP bakah, District mipuite thawhpuina leh ṭawiawmna a ngen a. 3R Centre din a nih theih nana Lunglei District tana Bana Kaih hnuaia MDTP sum petu Mizoram sawrkar leh Chief Minister te chungah lawm thu sawiin, 3R Centre chu chhim lam mipuite tana ṭangkai, hlawhtling tak leh daih rei zawka kalpui zel theih a nih a beisei thu a sawi.

He hun hi Lunglei District Urban Development Officer (DUDO) Pi Lalhruaitluangi'n kaihruaiin, 3R Centre chungchang leh MDTP chungchang a sawi fiah a. Chairman kaihhruaiin kal khawmte'n faina thutiam an sawi rual a. DUDO Lunglei leh Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP), Sub-Headquarters Lunglei te'n 3R Centre tana bungraw khawn khawm chungchanga thawk ho tura inremna thuthlung an ziak a. MHIP Sub-Headquarters Lunglei President Pi Lalliannguri chuan thu sawiin, 3R Centre hlawhtlinna atana MHIP te'n tha an thawh ve thei chu lawmawm an tih thu leh theih tawp chhuah zel an tum thu a sawi.

Lungleia 3R Centre hawnnaah hian sawrkar official-te, MHIP leh YMA hruaitute leh MJA member-te, Lunglei Government College-a Electoral Literacy Club member zirlaite an tel a. Bawlhhlawh thliar hran leh bawlhhlawh thehthang kawnga fimkhur tura intiamna signature campaign buatsaih nghal niin, Khuallian Pi Navneet Mann bakah kal khawmte'n hming an ziak a. Electoral roll endikna (Special Intensive Revision) kalpui mek chungchang inzirtirna, Voter Awareness Forum & Help Desk buatsaih ni bawkin, voter-te'n hriat duh an neihte inhrilhfiah a ni a. Khuallian Pi Navneet Mann chuan SIR kalpui mekah electoral dik leh felfai tak a awm theih nana ṭha taka thawhpui tur leh hun tiam chhung (May 30 – June 28)-a Enumeration Form theh lut ṭheuh turin District mipuite a chah.

3R Centre Project hi MDTP, Swachh Bharat Mission-Urban 2.0 leh DAY-NULM te nen ṭang tlanga kalpui niin, Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP), Sub-Headquarters Lunglei te nen thawh hona ziah a ni bawk a. MHIP te'n member-teah in chhung bungrua hman tawh lohte mi dangin ṭangkai zawka an hman theih nana thawh khawmin, a mamawhte'n a thlawna an lak theih nan ruahmanna siam a ni a. DAY-NULM hnuaia Self Help Group-te'n he'ng bungraw thawh khawm aṭanga thil ṭangkai zawk an siam chhuah (upcycle/recycle)-te man tlawm zawka lei theih turin chhawp chhuah ṭhin a ni bawk ang.

3R Centre hi Chanmari, Lunglei (BCM Biak In ep)-ah awmin, ni tin office hun chhungin hawn ṭhin a ni dawn a. Tun ṭumah hian Lunglei khawpui chhunga MHIP branch pasarih aṭangin bungrua khawn khawm niin, tun thla tawpah branch pasarih dang leh a bak branch pariat dang aṭangin July thlaah khawn leh tum a ni a. Hemi hnu hian mimal remchangte thawh khawm aṭangin hlawhtling taka kalpui chhunzawm zel beisei a ni a. 3R Centre enkawltute chuan mipuite'n an bungraw hlui la hman tlak site mi dangin an hman ṭangkai atan 3R Centre-ah hian pe ṭhin tur leh bungraw mamawhte chuan inthlahrung lova 3R Centre hi pan ṭhin turin mipuite an ngen.

title: ZPM official candidate files nomination for the Rajya Sabha MP election
content:
146/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 5th June, 2026:An election for the Rajya Sabha MP representing Mizoram will be held on June 18, 2026. The official candidate of the ruling Zoram People's Movement (ZPM) party, Shri K. Laltluangkima, filed his nomination paper today before the Returning Officer, Shri Zothansanga Ralte, Commissioner & Secretary of the Mizoram Legislative Assembly.

According to the notification issued by the Election Commission of India, candidates intending to contest can file their nominations until Monday, June 8, 2026. The scrutiny of the filed nominations will take place on June 9, 2026, and the deadline for the withdrawal of candidatures is open until June 11, 2026.Voting will take place on Thursday, June 18, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM. The counting of votes will begin at 5:00 PM on the same day.

On June 18, 2026, along with Mizoram, 10 states across India will elect their Rajya Sabha MPs. These states are Andhra Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Gujarat, Jharkhand, Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh, Manipur, Meghalaya, and Rajasthan.

Attachment

title: Rajya Sabha MP inthlan chuh turin ZPM official candidate-in hming pe
content:
862/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 5th June,2026:June ni 18, 2026 hian Mizoram aiawh tur Rajya Sabha MP (seat khat) thlan a ni dawn a, he inthlan chuh tur hian rorel lai Zoram People's Movement (ZPM) party official candidate Pu K. Laltluangkima chuan vawiin khan Returning Officer Pu Zothansanga Ralte, Commissioner & Secretary, Mizoram Legislative Assembly hnenah nomination a file.

Election Commission of India thuchhuah danin inthlan chuh tumte tan June ni 8, 2026 (Thawhtanni) thlengin nomination a file theih a, nomination file te hi June ni 9, 2026 ah endik niin, June ni 11, 2026 thleng inhnuhdawhna hun hawn a ni.

June ni 18, 2026 (Ningani) zing dar 9 atanga tlai dar 4 thleng vote thlakna hun hawn a ni ang a, hemi ni vek tlai dar 5 ah vote chhiar nghal a ni ang.

June ni 18, 2026 hian Mizoram telin India ram chhunga state 10 in Rajya Sabha MP tur an thlang dawn a, chung state te chu – Andhra Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Gujarat, Jharkhand, Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh, Manipur, Meghalaya leh Rajasthan te an ni.

Attachment

title: Commerce & Industry Minister-in MAHCO ANNUAL GENERAL ASSEMBLY 2026 hmanpui
content:
861/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 05 June 2026 :Vawiin khan Comerce & Industry Department changtu Minister Pu F. Rodingliana chuan I&PR Auditorium, Treasury Square-ah MIZORAM APEX HANDLOOM & HANDICRAFT COOPERATIVE SOCIETY LTD. (MAHCO) 47th ANNUAL GENERAL ASSEMBLY 2026 chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He hunah hian khuallian, Commerce & Industry Department changtu Minister Pu F. Rodingliana chuan thusawiin, MAHCO Annual General Assembly vawi 47na a hmanpui thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. India ram hmun hrang hrangah Cooperative Society-te dinhmun pawimawhzia leh Mizoramah pawh kawng tam taka State intodelhna tura ban pawimawh tak an nihzia tar langin, MAHCO chu mi tam tak eizawnna petu a ni tih a sawi a. Mizo puantah leh thiamhnang hmanga siam chhuah thilte chu hnam dang pawhin an hlutpui hle thin tih sawiin, kan hnam hmel tilangtu leh hnam rohlu vawn thatna pawimawh tak pawh a nihzia te hre reng turin kalkhawmte chu a chah bawk a. Minister chuan Sawrkar laipui chuan ruahmanna changtlung tak nen Handloom Industry tihhmasawndan tur ruahmanna a siam tih tarlangin, Mizoram pawhin chumi hlawhtlinna chu a hmuh chhoh zel a beisei tih a sawi a. Annual General Assembly chu hlawk taka hmang theuh turin kalkhawmte chu duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Assembly-ah hian Pu John LT. Sanga, Registrar, Cooperative Societies pawhin thusawiin, Handloom Industry chu mi tam tak eizawnna siamsaktu a nih angin, sawrkar pawhin a ngaipawimawh hle tih a sawi a. Computerisation of RCS Office hmalakna hnuaiah primary society ten dilna an thlen thinte pawh, District Cooperative Officer-te kaihhruainain, online veka kalpui tawh tur a nih dante tarlangin, tun hnai mai khan PACS 24-te hnenah Computer set leh a kaihhnawih thil pawimawhte pek chhuah a ni tih a sawi a. Mamawhtute tana awlsam zawkna turin Digitisation chu sawrkar ngaihpawimawh ber pakhat a ni tih a sawi bawk a ni.

MIZORAM APEX HANDLOOM & HANDICRAFT COOPERATIVE SOCIETY LTD. (MAHCO) hi kum 1977 khan din niin, Tun dinhmunah, MAHCO hnuaiah hian Cooperative Society 96 an awm mek a. Mizoramah hian puan taha ei zawng chu mi 25134 lai an awm nia ngaih a ni a. RCS hnuaiah pawh Handloom & Handicraft Primary Society 180 vel awmin, heng zinga zaa sawmngapathum vel chu MAHCO hnuaiah hian an inziak lut a ni.

Vawiina hun hman hi Pu Lalrinkima, Chairman, MAHCO chuan kaihruaiin kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pi L. Lalzidingi, Managing Director hnen atangin 2025-26 inkara MAHCO dinhmun tlangpui leh hmalaknate ngaihthlak niin, Pu Lalrinawma Pachuau, Manager hnen atangin MAHCO hmathlir leh hmalak zui zeldan tur (Annual Action Plan)-te ngaihthlak a ni bawk a. Member kum 70 chung lamte hnenah lawmpuina leh chawimawina thilpek hlan nghal a ni a. Pi Ngaichhingi, BOD, MAHCO Ltd.chuan lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitualah Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman dan tur rel
content:
860/2026-2027

Saitual 5th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah Pu Lallawmawma, Addl. DC kaihhruaiin District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day an thu khawm a, Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman dan tur an rel a ni.

He thutkhawmah hian Pu Andrew Lalthlamuana, ACF, Aizawl Forest Division chuan kum kalta lama GMD hman dan tlangpui report a pe a, hun hman dan tur rel chhunzawmin ruahmanna hrang hrang an siam a ni.

Kalkhawmte hian Green Mizoram Day Inaugural Function hi June 11, Ningani zing dar 7:00-ah Keifang Venghlun YMA Zawlbukah hman an rel a, khuallianah Saitual DC Pu Srinivas Sadi a ni ang. Kumin GMD thupui chu ‘Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni’ tih a ni.

Kumin Green Mizoram Day pual hian thing ṭiak chi hrang hrang phun rel a nih rualin kum kal ta lama thing phun tawh hmun hma tihfaia enkawl chhunzawm chu an ngaih pawimawh thu an sawi a, thingtiak phun duh ten Forest Department-ah an mamawh zat hriattir ni se, Forest department te hian a mamawh te hnenah thingtiak te hi dah sak zel dawn a ni. Thingphun tawh hmunhma tifaia hma la turin zirna in lama thuneitu hriattir ni se tih rel a ni a, an ni hian zirna in hrang hrangte kum kalta lama enkawl tura an chanpual thinah hma lo la tur leh ruahman belh a ngaih pawh a,  ruahmanna lo siam tura tih an ni.

Vawiin ṭhutkhawmah hian District Level Committee on GMD member-te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitualah District Level Implementing Committee (DLIC) on Mission Shakti thu khawm
content:
859/2026-2027

Saitual, the 5th June, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah District Level Implementing Committee (DLIC) on Mission Shakti chu an Chairperson, District Bawrhsap ni bawk Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan kaihhruaiin an thu khawm.

He hunah hian DLIC on Mission Shakti Chairperson Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan thu a sawi a, Mission Shakti thil tum te tihlawhtling tur chuan committee member tin ten activity hrang hrang awm te an hriat a, an theihna zawna an tan tlan a pawimawh a ni, a ti.

Vawiin inkhawm hi DLIC on Mission Shakti Chairperson, Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan a kai hruai a, Pi Mary Malsawmkimi, DMC, DHEW, chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin Mission Shakti thil tum te, hmalakna te, action plan te a tarlang bawk a ni. DLIC on Mission Shakti te hi June ni 12-ah an thukhawm leh ang.

Attachment

title: MZP KOLASIB BUATSAIHIN ZIRLAI TITHATE CHAWIMAWI AN NI
content:
858/2026-2027

Date Kolasib the 5th May 2026:Vawiin khan Mizo Zirlai Pawl (MZP), Kolasib Headquarters buatsaihin Parish Hall, Kolasib-ah kumin HSLC leh HSSLC exam-a zirlai tithate chawimawina  neih a ni a. He hunah hian Mizoram Legislative Assembly Deputy Speaker, Pu Lalfamkima chu Khuallian a ni a, Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chu Khualzahawm a ni.

Khuallian Pu Lalfamkima chuan zirlai tithate chawimawi nachang MZP in an hria chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Zirlaite chu zirlai an nihlai atanga tum mumal tak nei a, kawm tur thian thliar thiam a pawimawh thu a chah a . "Tuna thian inkawmngeih em em te pawh nakinah chuan kan dinhmun a la inang vek dawn lo a. Tunah tha tak taka pass kan awm rualin, kan tum tihlawhtling turin kawng a la thui hle a, inthlahdah mai lova tan lak chhunzawm zel a ngai a ni," a ti.

Sawrkarin hna lak kawngah thiamna tak tak neite chu a tling ngei turin a duh thu leh, dan ang thlapa advertisement hmanga hna lak a nih thin thu a sawi a. Zirna mai bakah hna a zirin fitness a pawimawh thu sawiin, "Tun hnaia lak tur Police, Home Guard leh Territorial Army-ah te pawh physical fitness ngaih pawimawh a nih avangin thalai tam takin ngawrh takin exercise an la a, hei hi thil lawmawm tak a ni," a ti bawk.

Zirtirtute inpekna chu chawimawi phu leh fakawm a tih thu sawiin an thawhrimnaah lawmthu a hrilh a. "Zirna chu lehkha thiamna ngawr ngawr piah lamah kan hawiher leh kan nunphung min chawikangtu a ni tih kan hriat reng a pawimawh a ni," a ti.

Khualzahawm Pu H. Dolianbuaia pawhin thu sawiin, zirna chu kawng engkima thanlenna kim a nih thu a sawi a. Mi zawng zawng chu competitive exam-a tling tura beisei theih an nih loh thu leh line hrang theuh kan neih thu a tarlang a. "Kan line theuhah hlawhtling taka kan thawh a ngai a ni. Tunlaiah chuan Sawrkar hna kher beisei lovin, infiamna emaw, sumdawnna emaw, eng pawh ni se hlawhtling ngei tura kan beih a ngai a ni," tiin zirlaite chu hlawhtlinna chang ngei turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Vawiin inkhawmah hian HSLC exam-a Distinction-a pass mi 21 te hnenah lawmpuina thuziak (citation) hlan an ni a. Heng bakah hian HSSLC-a zirlai tithate hnenah lawmpuina thuziak hi hlan an ni bawk.

He chawimawina inkhawm hi MZP Kolasib Vice President, Pu Lallawmzuala Sailo chuan a kaihruai a, Secretary Pu R.K. Lalchhuanawma hnen atangin report tawi ngaihthlak a ni. He hunah hian zirlai bakah an nu leh pa thahnem tak an kalkhawm a ni.

Attachment

title: IPRP&S Minister Pu B Lalchhanzova’n emPOWERu a hawng
content:
857/2026-2027

Aizawl the 5th June, 2026:Vawiin khan IPRP&S Minister B. Lalchhanzova chuan emPOWERu, Training and Development Institute, hawnna hun Kulikawna an Institute-ah a hman pui.

He hunah hian Minister chuan Mizo ten mahni invawnna kawngah leh mahni intundinna kawnga hmasawnna tur kawng kawhhmuhtu an awm chu lawmawm a ti a, hetiang lam Mizo ten kan hawi chho zel hi tha a tih thu a sawi. Sawrkar hna pawh a that rualin mahni a intundin tumna lam kan hawi zel hi a lawmawm a, hetiang kawnga  kaihruaitu leh zirtirtu an awm ta hi  lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a ni. Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan soft skills pawimawh zia sawiin tunlai khawvelah chuan eng hna pawh thawk dawn ila, midang nen kan indawrna kawngah hawihhawm taka indawr zel a tul thu sawiin hetiang zirna Mizorama kan nei ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

emPOWERu hawnna inkhawm hian Founder Director Pi Golda Dell Zohmangaihi chuan a kaihruai a. Thu sawiin, he Institute hian a tum ber chu Mizo mipui ten kan eizawnna kawnga hmasawnna tur, min lo dawrtute kan lo dawnsawn dan tha zawk te, kan hnuaia hnathawk te kan chhawr dan tha zawk te, kawng hrang hranga hlawhtlinna leh changkanna kawng kan zawh theih na tura inzirtir hi a ni a ti. Puitlin hnuah chauh ni lo, Middle School level  atanga inzirtir tan a pawimawh thu a sawi a, an thil tum a hlawhtlin chuan mahni a eizawng te leh mi hnuaia thawk te zawng zawng pawh sang takah a hlang kai thei dawn a ni, a ti.

emPOWERu Training Course hian Communication Skills, Leadership Skills, Influencing, Personal Skills, Interpersonal Skills, Creativity, Professional Skills leh a dang tangkai tak tak a huam dawn a. Zirlaite dinhmun hrechiang hmasa in an mamawh ang zawnga inzirtir hi an tum lian tak a ni a, hengah te hian zirlaiten hmasawnna tamtak an nei thei dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah Special Intensive Revision puala Enumeration Form sem kim a ni
content:
856/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 5th June 2026:Electoral roll siamthat beihpui kal mek Special Intensive Revision kal mekah Champhai District-ah vote thlak thei te hnenah Enumeration Form semchhuah tawh a ni.

Enumeration Phase hi May ni 30 atanga June ni 28 thleng kalpui tur a ni a, Champhaia Assembly Constituency pathum - 23-Champhai North, 24-Champhai South leh 25-East Tuipuiah te Booth Level Officer (BLO) te'n vawiin khan Enumeration Form an sem zo a, Champhai North-ah 20,435, Champhai South-ah 22,443 leh East Tuipuiah 15,968 sem a ni a, a vaiin Enumeration Form hi 58,846 sem chhuah a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman dan tur rel
content:
855/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 5th June 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Champhaiah District Level Committee on Green Mizoram an thukhawm a, Addl. DC Pu Lalbiakfela kaihhruaina hnuaiah Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman dan tur an rel.

He hunah hian District Forest Officer leh Member Secretary ni bawk Pu Lalbiakchama Chawngthu chuan nikuma Green Mizoram Day kalpui dan te sawiin meeting agenda a chhawpchhuak a, member te'n an ngaihdan sawi khawmin tunkuma hman dan tur an rel a. Green Mizoram Day hi June ni 11 a hman tur niin Zote Community Hall-a hman tha an ti a, he hunah hian khuallian chu Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib ni tura beisei a ni. Hemi ni hian sawrkar department te, tlawmngai pawl te leh pawl dang hrang hrangin Zote atanga Tiau kawngah thing hrang hrang an phun ang a, heng an phun te hi enkawl zel tura beisei an ni bawk ang. A lawmna hunah hian nikuma thing phun tha khua te hnenah lawmman sem a ni bawk ang.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP KAIHHRUAIIN LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT CHHUNGA RALTLAN TE BUHFAI SEM CHUNGCHANGAH THUTKHAWM NEI
content:
854/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 5th June 2026 :Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin a Office Chamber-ah Lawngtlai District chhunga Raltlan te buhfai sem chungchangah District Level Committee - ten thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Member kalkawmte chibai bukin, kumin bikah Raltlan te tan buhfai - 2850 quitals pe tura ruahmanna siam a ngaih thu a sawi a. Raltlan ten a hun takah an dawn a pawiwh hle tih sawiin, mu mal taka hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi a. Godown atanga buhfai phurhchhuah kawngah    Raltlan awmna veng VC leh NGO- te an pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian thahnem ngai taka sawrkar thawhpui turin a sawm nghal bawk.

Thutkhawm chuan Raltlan ten a huna taka buhfai an dawn theih nan hmalak ni se an ti a. A bik takin Raltlan awmna veng/ khua VC leh NGO- ten chak zawka an lo bawhzui theih nan a tul anga hmalak ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Addl. DC, SDO (S), Addl. SP, DCSO, SDC, District Organiser, DC Office,  President, CYLA leh Secretary, Lawngtlai District Village Council Association-  te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM KVI BOARD IN LUNGLEIAH TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
853/2026-2027

Lunglei the 5th June, 2027:Vawiin khan Mizoram KVI Board chuan SAMART Scheme hnuai a 'Sewing Machine Operator Training' chu Art&Culture Auditorium Lunglei-ah hawnna hun an buatsalh a, Pu C. Lalremliana Chairman,Mizoram KVIB Board in khuallian nlin a hawng.

He Puanthui zlrna hi MKVIB Training Centre, Chanmari Lunglei ah kalpui mek a ni a,tun a mite hi Batch 2na nlin,mi 25 an training mek a ni.Training hi darkar 300 chhung neih tur a ruahman a ni a,an training zawh ah an bultan nan Puanthui Khawl pek vek turn an ni.

Mizoram KVI Board hian Lunglei a an Training centre ah hian Trade hrang hrang ah Training pe turin an in buatsaih mek a,Lunglei Thalai te mahni tuina leh thiam zawng-ah Training turin an sawm a,Training chhuak te hi PMEGP leh Hand holding atangin an theih ang ang a tuamhlawm zel an turn a ni.
